title: National Money Mart Company ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] National Money Mart Company, commonly known as Money Mart, is a Canadian financial services company which provides payday loans, cheque cashing, tax preparation and money transfer services for underbanked or not-fully-served customers. Headquartered in Victoria, British Columbia, Money Mart operates in multiple locations across Canada. It has facilitated financial solutions for millions of customers since its inception in 1982.
